caption: Respond to a property possession claim
heading: Instalments
paragraph1: A decision about the instalments you can afford to pay will be made at the hearing. You’ll be able to tell the judge if your circumstances have changed between now and the hearing.
amountQuestion: How much could you afford to pay in addition to the current rent?
frequencyQuestion: How frequently could you afford to pay this amount?

errors.instalmentAmount: Enter how much you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent
errors.instalmentAmountFormat: Enter the amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent in the correct format
errors.instalmentAmountMax: The amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be less than £1 billion
errors.instalmentAmountMin: The amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be £0.00 or above
errors.instalmentFrequency: Select how frequently you could afford to pay this amount
